maestro.name: maestro
maestro.description: Intelligent coordinator - analyze intent + read project state → select optimal command chain → execute via Skill()
maestro.description_zh: 智能协调器 — 分析用户意图，读取项目状态，选择并执行最优命令链
maestro.workflow: 入口命令，自动路由到最优命令链
maestro.workflow_zh: 所有工作流的统一入口，可路由至任意下游命令

maestro-init.name: maestro-init
maestro-init.description: Initialize project with auto state detection (empty/code/existing) — creates .workflow/ directory structure
maestro-init.description_zh: 自动检测项目状态（空项目/代码库/已有项目），创建 .workflow/ 目录结构，包含 project.md、state.json、config.json 和 specs/
maestro-init.workflow_zh: 头脑风暴之后，路线图/规格生成之前执行

maestro-plan.name: maestro-plan
maestro-plan.description: Explore, clarify, plan, check, and confirm a phase execution plan — produces plan.json with waves and task definitions
maestro-plan.description_zh: 5 阶段规划流水线：探索 → 澄清需求 → 规划 → 检查 → 确认。生成包含波次和任务定义的 plan.json
maestro-plan.workflow_zh: 项目初始化和路线图就绪后执行，为 maestro-execute 生成计划

maestro-execute.name: maestro-execute
maestro-execute.description: Execute phase plan with wave-based parallel execution and atomic commits
maestro-execute.description_zh: 按波次并行执行阶段任务，支持依赖感知调度和原子提交。消费 plan.json 生成的任务定义
maestro-execute.workflow_zh: 消费 maestro-plan 产出的 plan.json，执行时内置验证门控（E2.7）

maestro-quick.name: maestro-quick
maestro-quick.description: Execute a quick task with workflow guarantees but skip optional agents
maestro-quick.description_zh: 快速执行单个任务，跳过规划阶段，同时保持原子提交和验证等工作流质量保证
maestro-quick.workflow: 独立使用，适合不需要完整规划流程的小任务
maestro-quick.workflow_zh: 适用场景：bug 修复、小功能、文档更新。替代 plan+execute 组合

maestro-brainstorm.name: maestro-brainstorm
maestro-brainstorm.description: Unified brainstorming with dual-mode operation — auto pipeline (multi-role synthesis) and single role analysis
maestro-brainstorm.description_zh: 双模式头脑风暴：自动模式（框架生成 → 多角色并行分析 → 综合输出）或单角色分析。输出 .brainstorming/ 目录中的结构化产物
maestro-brainstorm.workflow_zh: 工作流起点，为后续初始化和规划提供概念基础

maestro-analyze.name: maestro-analyze
maestro-analyze.description: Dual-layer analysis: macro (text) for requirement exploration with scope_verdict, micro (number) for phase-level 6-dimension deep analysis
maestro-analyze.description_zh: 双层分析：Macro（文本参数）宏观需求探索产出 scope_verdict，Micro（数字参数）Phase 级 6 维度深度分析。生成 analysis.md 和 context.md
maestro-analyze.workflow_zh: Macro 层在 roadmap 之前探索需求影响面，Micro 层在 plan 之前深度分析 Phase

maestro-collab.name: maestro-collab
maestro-collab.description: Multi-CLI collaborative analysis -- fan-out to multiple CLI tools, cross-verify, synthesize
maestro-collab.description_zh: 多 CLI 协作分析：将同一需求扇出到多个 CLI 工具并行分析，交叉验证输出中的共识与冲突，合成统一报告和标准下游产物
maestro-collab.workflow: 独立命令，可在任意阶段使用，产出标准 context.md + conclusions.json
maestro-collab.workflow_zh: 扇出到多个 CLI 并行分析，交叉验证后合成统一报告
flags: --tools <list> (指定 CLI 工具，逗号分隔)

maestro-roadmap.name: maestro-roadmap
maestro-roadmap.description: Interactive roadmap creation with iterative refinement — lightweight alternative to blueprint
maestro-roadmap.description_zh: 交互式路线图创建：需求分解 → 里程碑规划 → 迭代精化 → 阶段确认。blueprint 的轻量级替代方案
maestro-roadmap.workflow_zh: 项目初始化之后，阶段规划之前。适合不需要完整规格文档的项目

maestro-impeccable.name: maestro-impeccable
maestro-impeccable.description: Chain maestro-impeccable commands with intelligent routing and quality gate loops for automated UI production
maestro-impeccable.description_zh: 通过 critique/audit 评分驱动循环，将 impeccable skill 的命令编排为自动化质量门控管线，涵盖设计原型生成到生产加固
maestro-impeccable.workflow_zh: 可在规划前插入 UI 设计阶段（--chain build），为后续实现提供视觉参考

maestro-milestone-audit.name: maestro-milestone-audit
maestro-milestone-audit.description: Audit current milestone for cross-phase integration gaps
maestro-milestone-audit.description_zh: 审核当前里程碑的跨阶段集成差距，检查功能完整性和接口一致性
maestro-milestone-audit.workflow_zh: 里程碑归档前的质量门控

maestro-milestone-complete.name: maestro-milestone-complete
maestro-milestone-complete.description: Archive completed milestone and prepare for next
maestro-milestone-complete.description_zh: 归档已完成的里程碑，提取经验教训，准备下一个里程碑的工作目录

spec-setup.name: spec-setup
spec-setup.description: Initialize system specs by scanning project structure and generating conventions
spec-setup.description_zh: 扫描项目结构，自动生成代码约定、架构决策记录（ADR）和技术选型规范文件，初始化 specs/ 目录
spec-setup.workflow: maestro-init 自动调用，或独立使用
spec-setup.workflow_zh: 通常由 maestro-init 自动执行，也可单独调用刷新规格

spec-add.name: spec-add
spec-add.description: Add a spec entry (bug, pattern, decision, or rule) to the appropriate specs file
spec-add.description_zh: 向知识库添加规范条目：支持 project/global/team/personal 四种作用域，包含 bug、pattern、decision、rule 等分类
spec-add.workflow: 随时使用，记录开发过程中的决策和模式
spec-add.workflow_zh: 持续使用命令，在执行过程中积累项目知识

spec-load.name: spec-load
spec-load.description: Load relevant specs and lessons for current context (used by agents before execution)
spec-load.description_zh: 加载与当前上下文相关的规范和学习记录，供代理在执行前注入上下文。支持按角色和关键词过滤
spec-load.workflow_zh: 通常由代理系统自动调用，也可手动检查当前上下文规范

spec-remove.name: spec-remove
spec-remove.description: Remove a spec entry from a specs file by entry ID
spec-remove.description_zh: 通过条目 ID 从规范文件中删除指定条目。用于清理过时或错误的规范记录
spec-remove.workflow_zh: 配合 spec-add 使用，保持规范库整洁

quality-review.name: quality-review
quality-review.description: Tiered code review (quick/standard/deep) with parallel agents, severity classification, and auto-issue creation
quality-review.description_zh: 分层代码审查：quick（5 分钟）/ standard（全面）/ deep（深度，含安全审计）。并行代理审查，自动创建 BLOCK/WARN/INFO 分级问题
quality-review.workflow_zh: 执行完成后执行，发现问题可继续 quality-auto-test 或直接 phase-transition

quality-test.name: quality-test
quality-test.description: Conversational UAT with session persistence, auto-diagnosis, and gap-plan closure loop
quality-test.description_zh: 对话式用户验收测试：会话持久化 → 自动诊断失败 → 差距修复计划 → 闭环执行。支持烟雾测试和自动修复模式
quality-test.workflow_zh: 自动测试之后运行 UAT，发现失败可触发 quality-debug

quality-auto-test.name: quality-auto-test
quality-auto-test.description: Unified automated testing via CSV layer pipeline — generates, executes, and iterates tests from PRD specs, coverage gaps, or code exploration
quality-auto-test.description_zh: 统一自动测试 via CSV 层级管线：智能路由（spec/gap/code）→ 按层并行写测试 → 并行诊断失败 → 迭代收敛。替代原 quality-test-gen + quality-business-test + quality-integration-test
quality-auto-test.workflow_zh: 验证后执行自动测试（智能路由选择 spec/gap/code 来源），然后 UAT

quality-debug.name: quality-debug
quality-debug.description: Parallel hypothesis-driven debugging with UAT integration and structured root cause collection
quality-debug.description_zh: 并行假设驱动调试：多个并行代理同时验证不同假设，结构化根因收集，可从 UAT 失败直接触发
quality-debug.workflow_zh: 测试失败后的调试闭环

quality-integration-test.name: quality-integration-test
quality-integration-test.description_zh: [已废弃] 已合并入 quality-auto-test。使用 /quality-auto-test <phase> 替代。

quality-refactor.name: quality-refactor
quality-refactor.description: Tech debt reduction with reflection-driven iteration
quality-refactor.description_zh: 技术债务减少：识别债务 → 评估影响 → 制定重构计划 → 反思驱动迭代执行，保证现有测试全部通过
quality-refactor.workflow_zh: 代码审查发现技术债务后触发，重构后需重新测试

quality-sync.name: quality-sync
quality-sync.description: Sync codebase docs after code changes — traces git diff through component/feature/requirement impact chain
quality-sync.description_zh: 代码变更后同步文档：检测 git diff → 追踪组件/功能/需求影响链 → 更新 .workflow/codebase/ 受影响文档
quality-sync.workflow: 任何代码变更后使用，保持文档与代码同步
quality-sync.workflow_zh: 维护命令，确保代码库文档始终反映最新代码状态

manage-status.name: manage-status
manage-status.description: Display project dashboard with phase progress, active tasks, and next steps
manage-status.description_zh: 显示项目仪表板：当前阶段进度、活跃任务状态、里程碑完成度和推荐的下一步操作
manage-status.workflow: 随时使用，查看项目整体状态
manage-status.workflow_zh: 状态查询命令，不影响工作流

manage-knowhow.name: manage-knowhow
manage-knowhow.description: Manage memory entries — workflow memory (.workflow/knowhow/) and system memory (~/.claude/projects/*/memory/)
manage-knowhow.description_zh: 管理两类记忆存储：工作流记忆（.workflow/knowhow/，项目级）和系统记忆（~/.claude/projects/*/memory/，跨项目）
manage-knowhow.workflow: 随时使用，管理和维护项目知识库

manage-knowhow-capture.name: manage-knowhow-capture
manage-knowhow-capture.description: Capture session memory (compact or tips) into .workflow/knowhow/ with JSON index
manage-knowhow-capture.description_zh: 将当前会话的经验捕获为记忆：compact（会话压缩摘要）或 tip（单个专业提示）。带 JSON 索引便于后续检索
manage-knowhow-capture.workflow: 阶段或会话结束时使用，沉淀经验
manage-knowhow-capture.workflow_zh: 在阶段完成或会话结束时使用

manage-codebase-rebuild.name: manage-codebase-rebuild
manage-codebase-rebuild.description: Full rebuild of codebase documentation — scans project, builds doc-index.json, generates all tech-registry and feature-maps
manage-codebase-rebuild.description_zh: 全量重建 .workflow/codebase/ 文档系统：扫描整个项目 → 识别组件/功能/需求/ADR → 并行生成所有文档产物（覆盖已有文档）
manage-codebase-rebuild.workflow: 项目初始化后或代码库大幅变更后使用
manage-codebase-rebuild.workflow_zh: 重量级操作，覆盖现有文档。增量更新请用 manage-codebase-refresh

manage-codebase-refresh.name: manage-codebase-refresh
manage-codebase-refresh.description: Incremental refresh of codebase docs based on recent changes
manage-codebase-refresh.description_zh: 增量刷新代码库文档：检测变更文件 → 识别受影响文档 → 仅重新生成必要部分。比全量重建快得多
manage-codebase-refresh.workflow: 日常代码变更后使用，替代 manage-codebase-rebuild 的轻量级方案

manage-issue.name: manage-issue
manage-issue.description: Issue CRUD operations — create, query, update, close, and link issues to tasks
manage-issue.description_zh: 交互式问题管理：创建（记录 bug/功能需求）、查询（按状态/标签过滤）、更新、关闭、链接到任务
manage-issue.workflow: 质量审查或测试发现问题后使用
manage-issue.workflow_zh: 配合 quality-review 和 quality-debug 使用

manage-issue-discover.name: manage-issue-discover
manage-issue-discover.description: Automated issue discovery — multi-perspective analysis or prompt-driven exploration
manage-issue-discover.description_zh: 自动发现潜在问题：多视角分析（安全/性能/可用性/可维护性）或提示驱动探索。批量创建待跟踪问题
manage-issue-discover.workflow: 主动质量扫描时使用，或在里程碑审计前运行
manage-issue-discover.workflow_zh: 配合 maestro-milestone-audit 使用，发现集成差距
flags: [by-prompt "what to look for"] (提示驱动模式)

maestro-fork.name: maestro-fork
maestro-fork.description: Create a worktree for milestone-level parallel development, or sync existing worktree with main
maestro-fork.description_zh: 为整个里程碑创建 git worktree，实现里程碑间并行开发。显式复制项目上下文和阶段目录到工作树
maestro-fork.workflow: 里程碑规划完成后使用，支持多里程碑并行开发
maestro-fork.workflow_zh: maestro-merge 的前置操作，创建并行开发环境

maestro-learn.name: maestro-learn
maestro-learn.description: Learning coordinator — route intent to learn commands, execute single or multi-step chains
maestro-learn.description_zh: 学习协调器：根据意图文本路由到最优学习命令，支持单命令或链式多步学习
maestro-learn.workflow_zh: 自动识别学习意图并路由到 learn-* 命令

maestro-link-coordinate.name: maestro-link-coordinate
maestro-link-coordinate.description: Step-mode graph coordinator via maestro coordinate endpoint — executes chain nodes one by one with session tracking
maestro-link-coordinate.description_zh: 步进式工作流协调器：逐节点执行命令链图，决策/门控/评估节点自动解析，会话持久化支持恢复
maestro-link-coordinate.workflow: maestro-coordinate 的步进版本，适合需要逐步确认的场景
maestro-link-coordinate.workflow_zh: 适合长时间运行的复杂工作流，每步可暂停恢复

maestro-merge.name: maestro-merge
maestro-merge.description: Two-phase merge of milestone worktree branch back — git merge first, artifact sync only on success
maestro-merge.description_zh: 两阶段合并：先 git merge（源代码），成功后再同步工作流产物（工件）。防止合并冲突时的部分状态损坏
maestro-merge.workflow_zh: maestro-fork 的收尾操作，将工作树成果合并回主分支

maestro-milestone-release.name: maestro-milestone-release
maestro-milestone-release.description: Version bump, changelog generation, and git tag for a completed milestone
maestro-milestone-release.description_zh: 版本号递增、变更日志生成和 git 标签创建。支持 semver 自动递增和自定义版本号
maestro-milestone-release.workflow_zh: 里程碑归档后的最终交付步骤

maestro-overlay.name: maestro-overlay
maestro-overlay.description: Create or edit a non-invasive overlay that augments existing slash commands based on natural-language intent
maestro-overlay.description_zh: 创建或编辑非侵入式命令叠加层：JSON 补丁文件增强 .claude/commands/*.md，存储于 ~/.maestro/overlays/，自动应用
maestro-overlay.workflow: 自定义命令行为，无需修改原始 .md 文件
maestro-overlay.workflow_zh: 叠加层在 maestro install 时自动应用，支持追加/前置/替换 XML 段落

maestro-amend.name: maestro-amend
maestro-amend.description: Collect deficiency signals from workflow artifacts, sessions, and user reports, then generate overlays to amend workflow commands
maestro-amend.description_zh: 从工作流产物、会话和用户报告中收集缺陷信号，生成叠加层修补工作流命令。支持从验证结果、审查报告、会话和问题中提取改进信号
maestro-amend.workflow: execute/review 后使用，修补发现的命令缺陷
maestro-amend.workflow_zh: 自动分析缺陷来源，生成 overlay 修补命令行为

maestro-composer.name: maestro-composer
maestro-composer.description: Semantic workflow composer — parse natural language into DAG of skill/CLI/agent nodes, auto-inject checkpoints, persist as reusable JSON template
maestro-composer.description_zh: 语义工作流作曲器：将自然语言描述解析为 DAG（有向无环图），自动注入检查点，持久化为可复用 JSON 模板。支持 skill/CLI/agent 三类节点
maestro-composer.workflow: 创建可复用工作流模板
maestro-composer.workflow_zh: 输出 JSON 模板，通过 /maestro-player 执行

maestro-player.name: maestro-player
maestro-player.description: Workflow template player — load JSON template, bind variables, execute DAG nodes in order, persist state at checkpoints, support resume
maestro-player.description_zh: 工作流模板播放器：加载 JSON 模板 → 绑定变量 → 按 DAG 顺序执行节点 → 检查点持久化状态 → 支持恢复。maestro-composer 的执行搭档
maestro-player.workflow: 执行 maestro-composer 创建的模板
maestro-player.workflow_zh: 加载模板、绑定上下文变量、逐节点执行

maestro-update.name: maestro-update
maestro-update.description: Interactive workflow migration — detect version, preview changes, apply upgrades
maestro-update.description_zh: 交互式工作流迁移：检测当前版本 → 预览变更差异 → 应用升级。确保 .claude/commands/ 和工作流配置保持最新
maestro-update.workflow_zh: 安全升级命令和工作流文件，支持预览和确认

learn-decompose.name: learn-decompose
learn-decompose.description: Decompose code into cataloged design patterns, saving findings to specs and wiki
learn-decompose.description_zh: 系统性模式提取：4 维度（结构/行为/数据/错误）分析代码，并行代理探索，发现可复用设计模式并编目
learn-decompose.workflow: 学习或理解代码时使用
learn-decompose.workflow_zh: 将代码经验固化为可复用模式，供后续规划和开发参考

learn-follow.name: learn-follow
learn-follow.description: Guided follow-along reading of code or wiki entries, extracting patterns and building understanding
learn-follow.description_zh: 引导式阅读体验：逐段遍历代码或知识图谱条目，通过强制提问提取模式、识别假设、构建结构化理解图
learn-follow.workflow: 学习代码库或理解已有知识时使用
learn-follow.workflow_zh: 输出阅读笔记，包含提取的模式、开放问题和连接点

learn-investigate.name: learn-investigate
learn-investigate.description: Systematic question investigation with hypothesis testing, evidence logging, and 3-strike escalation
learn-investigate.description_zh: 系统性调查工作流：假设生成 → 测试验证 → 结构化证据记录，3 次假设失败后升级询问用户
learn-investigate.workflow: 回答「X 是如何工作的？」「为什么会发生 Y？」等问题
learn-investigate.workflow_zh: 不同于 quality-debug（修复 bug），此命令专注于理解性问题

learn-retro.name: learn-retro
learn-retro.description: Unified retrospective — git activity metrics and decision quality evaluation with lens-based selection
learn-retro.description_zh: 统一复盘：结合 git 活动分析（提交指标、会话检测、文件热点）和决策质量评估（跨 wiki/spec/git 追踪），支持独立或组合使用
learn-retro.workflow: 定期复盘项目进展或评估决策质量
learn-retro.workflow_zh: 所有洞察持久化到 lessons.jsonl，支持跨会话查询

learn-second-opinion.name: learn-second-opinion
learn-second-opinion.description: Multi-perspective analysis with review, challenge, and consult modes
learn-second-opinion.description_zh: 结构化第二意见：review（3 个并行代理独立评估）、challenge（对抗性代理寻找隐藏假设）、consult（交互式问答）
learn-second-opinion.workflow: 审查代码、验证决策或评估方案时使用
learn-second-opinion.workflow_zh: 与阶段/执行生命周期解耦，可随时对任意代码或知识调用

manage-harvest.name: manage-harvest
manage-harvest.description: Extract knowledge from workflow artifacts and route to wiki / spec / issue stores
manage-harvest.description_zh: 从工作流产物（分析结果、头脑风暴输出、调试会话、规划/修复结果）提取知识片段，路由到 wiki/spec/issue 三类存储
manage-harvest.workflow: 任意工作流完成后使用，防止知识流失
manage-harvest.workflow_zh: 闭环：harvest 提取 → wiki/spec/issue 存储 → 下游命令消费（wiki-digest、spec-load、maestro-plan --gaps）

manage-learn.name: manage-learn
manage-learn.description: Capture, search, and review atomic learning insights and tips into .workflow/learning/lessons.jsonl
manage-learn.description_zh: 统一原子知识捕获：洞察（模式、陷阱、技术）和提示（跨会话恢复笔记），存储到 .workflow/learning/lessons.jsonl
manage-learn.workflow: 随时使用，管理和查询学习库
manage-learn.workflow_zh: 与 learn-retro、quality-retrospective 共享 lessons.jsonl 存储

manage-wiki.name: manage-wiki
manage-wiki.description: Wiki knowledge graph management — health dashboard, orphan cleanup, entry search, and graph statistics
manage-wiki.description_zh: 知识图谱管理工具：健康仪表板（连通性、孤立条目检测）、条目搜索、孤立清理和图谱统计
manage-wiki.workflow_zh: 配合 wiki-connect 和 wiki-digest 使用

quality-business-test.name: quality-business-test
quality-business-test.description: [DEPRECATED] Merged into quality-auto-test (spec route). Use /quality-auto-test <phase> instead.
quality-business-test.description_zh: [已废弃] 已合并入 quality-auto-test（spec 路由模式）。当检测到 REQ-*.md 时自动进入 spec 路由。

quality-retrospective.name: quality-retrospective
quality-retrospective.description: Multi-lens 复盘 of completed phase(s); routes insights to spec/note/issue stores and the lessons library
quality-retrospective.description_zh: 执行后多视角复盘：技术/流程/质量/决策 4 个并行视角，提取可复用洞察，路由到 spec/memory/issue 存储
quality-retrospective.workflow_zh: 自动扫描未复盘的已完成阶段，所有洞察持久化到 lessons.jsonl

wiki-connect.name: wiki-connect
wiki-connect.description: Surface hidden connections in the wiki knowledge graph and suggest or apply new links
wiki-connect.description_zh: 知识图谱关联发现：分析 wiki 索引找到孤立条目、缺失连接和传递链接缺口，建议或自动应用新关联
wiki-connect.workflow: 定期维护知识图谱完整性
wiki-connect.workflow_zh: 利用 BM25 搜索和反向链接基础设施，改善图谱连通性

wiki-digest.name: wiki-digest
wiki-digest.description: Generate knowledge digest from wiki entries with theme clustering, gap analysis, and coverage heatmap
wiki-digest.description_zh: 知识综合命令：语义主题聚类 → 知识缺口识别 → 覆盖度热力图，产出可操作的摘要和推荐下一步
wiki-digest.workflow: 定期综合知识图谱内容
wiki-digest.workflow_zh: 不同于 wiki list（原始条目），此命令综合解释知识库，产出精选摘要

maestro-tools-register.name: maestro-tools-register
maestro-tools-register.description: Register tool specs — extract, generate, or optimize reusable process/tool definitions into .workflow/specs/tools.md
maestro-tools-register.description_zh: Codify reusable business processes as tool specs. Auto-discovered by agents via spec load and spec-injector
maestro-tools-register.workflow: Register during planning · after execution · before testing · during retrospective/harvest
maestro-tools-register.workflow_zh: plan → execute → test → retrospective, auto-discovered by agents via spec-injector

maestro-tools-execute.name: maestro-tools-execute
maestro-tools-execute.description: Load and execute tool specs by role or name — supports direct invocation by name or role-based recommendation
maestro-tools-execute.description_zh: 加载并执行工具规格：支持按名称直接调用、按角色推荐或交互式选择。逐步执行并报告进度
maestro-tools-execute.workflow_zh: 加载已注册的工具定义并按步骤执行

maestro-swarm-workflow.name: maestro-swarm-workflow
maestro-swarm-workflow.description: Parallel workflow accelerator — routes user intent to 8 pre-built Workflow scripts for multi-agent concurrent execution
maestro-swarm-workflow.description_zh: 并行工作流加速层 — 将用户意图路由到 8 个预构建的 Workflow 脚本，实现多 agent 并发执行。覆盖 analyze/brainstorm/review/verify/grill/plan/execute/milestone-audit
maestro-swarm-workflow.workflow: 独立使用或作为 ralph chain 中的步骤
maestro-swarm-workflow.workflow_zh: 可独立调用，也可集成到 ralph 生命周期链中作为并行加速步骤

maestro-companion.name: maestro-companion
maestro-companion.description: Knowledge companion — side-car utility for task context loading, structured companion doc recording, insight capture, and skill routing
maestro-companion.description_zh: 知识伴侣 — 伴随任意任务的知识上下文加载、结构化记录、洞察捕获和技能路由。不创建 session，不修改工作流状态
maestro-companion.workflow: before（任务前）→ note（任务中）→ after（任务后）→ route（推荐下一步）
maestro-companion.workflow_zh: 四模式操作：before 加载上下文、note 记录洞察、after 沉淀知识、route 推荐技能

maestro-next.name: maestro-next
maestro-next.description: Single-command recommendation engine — parses intent and project state, recommends one atomic command via routing-table scoring
maestro-next.description_zh: 单命令推荐引擎 — 解析意图和项目状态，通过路由表评分推荐一个原子命令。不创建 session，不写 status.json
maestro-next.workflow: 独立使用，轻量路由入口
maestro-next.workflow_zh: 与 /maestro 和 /maestro-ralph 的区别：不触发链，始终推荐 1 个命令 + 2-3 备选

manage-drift-realign.name: manage-drift-realign
manage-drift-realign.description: Detect and realign .workflow/ artifact drift against code reality after refactoring — git timeline + session history driven
manage-drift-realign.description_zh: 检测重构后代码现实与 .workflow/ 文档产物的偏移，通过 git 时间线 + session 历史驱动的 4 路并行扫描器识别漂移，交互式对齐
manage-drift-realign.workflow: 互补于 manage-knowledge-audit：audit 检查知识内部矛盾，drift-realign 检查代码↔文档偏离
manage-drift-realign.workflow_zh: 9 Stage 流程：时间线重建 → 漂移评分 → 4 并行 scanner（roadmap/spec/codebase/artifact）→ 合并+冲突标记集成 → 交互分诊 → 备份+应用 → 报告。支持 maestro timeline CLI 独立复用

manage-knowledge-audit.name: manage-knowledge-audit
manage-knowledge-audit.description: Audit and prune spec/knowhow/artifact tri-store — detect contradictions, staleness, orphans; apply keep/deprecate/delete decisions
manage-knowledge-audit.description_zh: 审计 spec/knowhow/artifact 三存储 — 检测矛盾、过期、孤立条目；应用 keep/deprecate/delete 三态决策清理
manage-knowledge-audit.workflow: 与 manage-harvest 对称：harvest 积累知识，audit 清理知识
manage-knowledge-audit.workflow_zh: 8 类 28 子场景审计：显式/隐式矛盾、过期、元数据质量、Maestro 特定、Timeline 产物、Knowhow 漂移、Artifact 残留

maestro-grill.name: maestro-grill
maestro-grill.description: Socratic stress-testing — adversarial questioning against codebase reality, verifying assumptions with code evidence
maestro-grill.description_zh: 苏格拉底式压力测试 — 对抗性提问验证方案假设，用代码证据挑战模糊术语，产出验证过的 context-package
maestro-grill.workflow_zh: 在 brainstorm 之前使用，验证方案假设后再进行头脑风暴

maestro-blueprint.name: maestro-blueprint
maestro-blueprint.description: Generate formal spec package (Product Brief, PRD, Architecture, Epics) through 6-phase document chain with multi-CLI analysis
maestro-blueprint.description_zh: 生成正式规格文档包（产品简报、PRD、架构、Epics）— 6 阶段文档链 + 多 CLI 分析 + 交互式精炼。纯文档，不生成代码
maestro-blueprint.workflow_zh: 与 brainstorm 互补：brainstorm 是发散探索（轻量），blueprint 是收敛文档（重量级 6 阶段）

maestro-ralph.name: maestro-ralph
maestro-ralph.description: Closed-loop decision engine for the maestro workflow lifecycle -- reads project state, infers position, builds adaptive chain, delegates execution
maestro-ralph.description_zh: 闭环决策引擎 — 读取项目状态，推断当前位置，构建自适应命令链，委派执行。支持 intent/status/continue 三种入口
maestro-ralph.workflow: Use when optimal command sequence is unclear
maestro-ralph.workflow_zh: 当最优命令序列不明确时使用，自动推断并构建执行链

maestro-ralph-execute.name: maestro-ralph-execute
maestro-ralph-execute.description: Single-step executor for ralph (adaptive) and maestro (static) sessions -- locate session, find next step, resolve args, execute, update, self-invoke next
maestro-ralph-execute.description_zh: 单步执行器 — 定位会话，查找下一步，解析参数，执行，更新状态，自动调用下一步。与 ralph 互调形成自延续工作循环
maestro-ralph-execute.workflow_zh: ralph 会话的步进执行器，每次调用执行一个步骤

maestro-guard.name: maestro-guard
maestro-guard.description: Manage editing boundary restrictions -- configure directory-level write boundaries enforced by the workflow-guard PreToolUse hook
maestro-guard.description_zh: 编辑边界控制 — 配置目录级写入边界，由 workflow-guard PreToolUse 钩子强制执行。启用后，对允许路径外的 Write/Edit 调用将被阻止
maestro-guard.workflow_zh: 在需要限制编辑范围的任务前配置

maestro-ui-codify.name: maestro-ui-codify
maestro-ui-codify.description: Extract design system from code, generate reference package, persist as knowledge assets -- 4-phase pipeline: validate, extract, package, knowhow
maestro-ui-codify.description_zh: 从代码中提取 UI 设计系统 — 4 阶段管线：验证参数 → 3 并行代理提取样式/动画/布局 → 生成参考包 → 持久化为知识资产
maestro-ui-codify.workflow: Extract design tokens from existing code
maestro-ui-codify.workflow_zh: 从现有代码中提取设计标记，生成可复用的设计系统知识包

security-audit.name: security-audit
security-audit.description: OWASP Top 10 and STRIDE security auditing with supply chain analysis -- three tiers: quick, standard, deep
security-audit.description_zh: 系统性安全审计 — 覆盖 OWASP Top 10、依赖供应链、密钥泄露检测、CI/CD 管线审查和可选 STRIDE 威胁建模。三级深度控制
security-audit.workflow: Run before releases or after security-sensitive changes
security-audit.workflow_zh: 发布前或安全敏感变更后运行

maestro-universal-workflow.name: maestro-universal-workflow
maestro-universal-workflow.description: Dynamic adversarial workflow generator -- scan library, match or generate, execute, persist
maestro-universal-workflow.description_zh: 动态对抗式工作流生成器 — 扫描工作流库，匹配或生成专用脚本，执行并持久化。支持 shallow/standard/deep 三级对抗深度
maestro-universal-workflow.workflow: Independent use for ad-hoc complex workflows
maestro-universal-workflow.workflow_zh: 独立使用，适合需要对抗式决策的复杂临时工作流

odyssey-debug.name: odyssey-debug
odyssey-debug.description: Long-running debug cycle — archaeology, diagnosis, fix, confirmation, generalization, discovery, and knowledge persistence
odyssey-debug.description_zh: 长周期闭环调试：考古（git 变更溯源）→ 探索 → 假设驱动诊断 → 修复确认 → 泛化（举一反三）→ 发现同类 → 沉淀学习。三句哲学约束：零遗留 / 穷尽迭代 / 改进即标准
odyssey-debug.workflow: Independent deep debugging — treats every bug as a learning signal
odyssey-debug.workflow_zh: 独立深度调试，将每个 bug 视为学习信号。与 quality-debug（快速修复）不同，本命令深入 git 历史、扫描同类问题

odyssey-improve.name: odyssey-improve
odyssey-improve.description: Long-running codebase improvement cycle — multi-dimensional audit, deep diagnosis, targeted fix, verify, generalize, and engineering knowledge persistence
odyssey-improve.description_zh: 代码质量深度提升：基线测量 → 6 维审计 → 根因诊断 → 逐轮修复（按 severity 递降）→ 验证 → 泛化 → 沉淀。穷尽修复至 0 remaining actionable findings
odyssey-improve.workflow: Independent deep improvement — combines static analysis with runtime-aware reasoning
odyssey-improve.workflow_zh: 独立深度改进，结合静态分析与运行时感知。与 quality-review（通过/失败门控）不同，本命令逐个根因诊断并穷尽修复

odyssey-planex.name: odyssey-planex
odyssey-planex.description: Requirement-driven iterative cycle — plan, execute, strict verify, fix loop until acceptance criteria met
odyssey-planex.description_zh: 需求到交付闭环：解析需求 → 严格验收标准 → 分解任务 → 执行 → 验证 → 修复差距 → 迭代直到 ALL 标准通过。不允许「接近通过」
odyssey-planex.workflow: Independent requirement-to-delivery loop — acceptance criteria are sacred
odyssey-planex.workflow_zh: 独立需求交付循环，验收标准神圣不可侵犯。与 maestro-execute（按计划执行）不同，本命令自带 verify→fix 闭环迭代

odyssey-review-test-fix.name: odyssey-review-test-fix
odyssey-review-test-fix.description: Deep review + fix cycle — archaeology, exploration, multi-dimensional review, targeted fix, generalization, discovery, and knowledge persistence
odyssey-review-test-fix.description_zh: 多维度深度审查 + 穷尽修复：考古 → 探索 → 多维审查 → 全 severity 逐轮修复 + re-review gate → 泛化到全项目。每次修复后重审同区域
odyssey-review-test-fix.workflow: Independent deep code review with exhaustive fix — find one, fix one, find all
odyssey-review-test-fix.workflow_zh: 独立深度审查修复，发现一个修复一个再扫描全部。与 quality-review（门控裁决）不同，本命令自动修复并泛化

odyssey-ui.name: odyssey-ui
odyssey-ui.description: Long-running UI optimization cycle — visual survey, multi-dimensional audit, divergent exploration, fix, verify, generalize, and design knowledge persistence
odyssey-ui.description_zh: UI 深度打磨循环：视觉普查 → 6 维审计 → 发散探索 → 修复 → 浏览器验证 → 泛化到兄弟组件 → 沉淀设计知识。按 impact×severity 递降穷尽修复
odyssey-ui.workflow: Independent deep UI polish — every pixel tells a story
odyssey-ui.workflow_zh: 独立深度 UI 打磨，每个像素都有故事。与 maestro-impeccable（单次执行）不同，本命令是持久化会话，带证据链和迭代改进

team-lifecycle-v4.name: team-lifecycle-v4
team-lifecycle-v4.description: Full lifecycle team skill — plan, develop, test, review in one coordinated session with role-based beat model architecture
team-lifecycle-v4.description_zh: 完整软件开发生命周期的多智能体编排：规格 → 规划 → 实现 → 测试 → 代码审查，采用角色驱动的节拍模型架构
team-lifecycle-v4.workflow: 适用于需要完整团队协作的大型功能开发
team-lifecycle-v4.workflow_zh: 替代单 agent 顺序执行，实现并行多角色协作

team-coordinate.name: team-coordinate
team-coordinate.description: Universal team coordination skill with dynamic role generation — analyze task → generate role-specs → dispatch → execute → deliver
team-coordinate.description_zh: 通用团队协调：分析任务 → 动态生成角色规范 → 分派 → 执行 → 交付。协调器是唯一内置角色，所有工作角色在运行时动态生成
team-coordinate.workflow: 适用于任意需要多角色协作的任务
team-coordinate.workflow_zh: 最灵活的团队技能，角色完全按任务需求动态创建

team-executor.name: team-executor
team-executor.description: Lightweight session execution skill — resumes existing team sessions for pure execution via team-worker agents
team-executor.description_zh: 轻量级执行技能：加载现有会话 → 协调状态 → 启动 team-worker 代理执行。无分析、无角色生成，纯执行
team-executor.workflow: 配合 team-coordinate 使用，用于恢复中断的会话
team-executor.workflow_zh: team-coordinate 的执行续集，用于会话恢复

team-testing.name: team-testing
team-testing.description: Multi-agent testing team — strategist → generator → executor → analyst with progressive L1/L2/L3 coverage and Generator-Critic loops
team-testing.description_zh: 多智能体测试团队：策略师 → 生成器 → 执行器 → 分析师。Generator-Critic 循环确保覆盖率收敛，L1/L2/L3 渐进式测试层
team-testing.workflow: 替代 quality-auto-test + quality-test 组合，适合复杂测试场景
team-testing.workflow_zh: 专用测试团队，比单命令测试更全面

team-review.name: team-review
team-review.description: Multi-agent code review — scanner → reviewer → fixer with 4-dimension analysis (SEC/COR/PRF/MNT)
team-review.description_zh: 多智能体代码审查：扫描器（工具链+LLM）→ 审查者（深度分析，根因溯源）→ 修复者（自动修复，失败回滚）。4 维度：安全/正确性/性能/可维护性
team-review.workflow: 替代 quality-review 命令，提供更深度的多角色协作审查
team-review.workflow_zh: 专用审查团队，比单命令审查更彻底

team-quality-assurance.name: team-quality-assurance
team-quality-assurance.description: Full closed-loop QA team — scout → strategist → generator → executor → analyst with discovery, testing, and full modes
team-quality-assurance.description_zh: 完整闭环 QA 团队：侦察者（问题发现）→ 策略师 → 生成器 → 执行器 → 分析师。支持 discovery/testing/full 三种模式
team-quality-assurance.workflow: 替代 manage-issue-discover + quality-auto-test + quality-test 组合
team-quality-assurance.workflow_zh: 最完整的 QA 解决方案，覆盖问题发现到测试验证的全流程

team-tech-debt.name: team-tech-debt
team-tech-debt.description: Tech debt governance team — scanner → assessor → planner → executor → validator with 5 debt dimensions
team-tech-debt.description_zh: 系统性技术债务治理：扫描 → 评估影响 → 制定修复计划 → 执行重构 → 验证结果。5 个债务维度：代码质量/架构/安全/性能/文档
team-tech-debt.workflow: 替代 quality-refactor 命令，适合大规模技术债务治理
team-tech-debt.workflow_zh: 专用债务治理团队，比单命令重构更系统

codify-to-knowhow.name: codify-to-knowhow
codify-to-knowhow.description: Manifest-driven knowledge asset generator — converts any structured package into maestro knowhow + spec entries with ref linking
codify-to-knowhow.description_zh: 通用 manifest 驱动的知识资产生成器：读取 knowhow-manifest.json → 创建 knowhow 文件 → 创建 spec 条目 → 通过 ref 建立索引-详文桥梁
codify-to-knowhow.workflow: 上游 skill 生成 manifest 后调用
codify-to-knowhow.workflow_zh: 上游 skill（如 maestro-ui-codify）负责生成 manifest，本 skill 负责执行知识写入

skill-iter-tune.name: skill-iter-tune
skill-iter-tune.description: Iterative skill tuning via execute-evaluate-improve feedback loop with two-tool pipeline (Claude + Gemini)
skill-iter-tune.description_zh: 迭代式技能调优：Claude 执行技能 → Gemini 评估质量 → Agent 应用改进。循环直到达到质量阈值或最大迭代次数
skill-iter-tune.workflow: 独立使用，优化现有 skill 的输出质量
skill-iter-tune.workflow_zh: 支持单 skill 和 skill chain 两种调优模式

workflow-skill-designer.name: workflow-skill-designer
workflow-skill-designer.description: Meta-skill for designing orchestrator+phases structured workflow skills with progressive phase loading
workflow-skill-designer.description_zh: 元技能：设计编排器+阶段结构的工作流技能。生成 SKILL.md 协调器和 phases/ 文件夹，支持渐进式阶段加载和 TodoWrite 模式
workflow-skill-designer.workflow: 创建新工作流 skill 时使用
workflow-skill-designer.workflow_zh: 从命令/文本描述/需求文档/现有 skill 四种输入源生成完整 skill 包

team-swarm.name: team-swarm
team-swarm.description: ACO-driven swarm intelligence with pheromone optimizer — 4 roles + Python controller + 5 specs for collective problem solving
team-swarm.description_zh: ACO 蚁群智能技能 — 信息素优化器驱动的群体问题求解。4 角色（协调器、蚁群、分析师、评分器）+ Python 控制器 + 5 份 spec
team-swarm.workflow: 适用于需要多路径探索和群体收敛的复杂问题
team-swarm.workflow_zh: 蚁群算法驱动，多 agent 并行探索解空间，通过信息素机制收敛到最优解

team-arch-opt.name: team-arch-opt
team-arch-opt.description: Architecture optimization team — multi-role analysis, bottleneck identification, and refactoring of system architecture
team-arch-opt.description_zh: 多角色架构优化团队：分析系统架构 → 识别瓶颈 → 重构落地，由协调器编排 team-worker 代理执行

team-brainstorm.name: team-brainstorm
team-brainstorm.description: Multi-role brainstorming team — generates diverse perspectives and synthesizes a converged solution
team-brainstorm.description_zh: 多角色头脑风暴团队：从不同视角生成方案 → 交叉验证 → 综合最优解

team-designer.name: team-designer
team-designer.description: Team skill scaffolding — designs and generates new team skill structures with role directories
team-designer.description_zh: 团队技能脚手架：设计并生成新的 team skill 结构与角色目录

team-frontend.name: team-frontend
team-frontend.description: Frontend development team — component-driven UI implementation with multi-role collaboration
team-frontend.description_zh: 前端开发团队：组件驱动的 UI 实现，多角色协作完成前端功能

team-frontend-debug.name: team-frontend-debug
team-frontend-debug.description: Frontend debugging team — Chrome DevTools-driven visual and runtime issue resolution
team-frontend-debug.description_zh: 前端调试团队：基于 Chrome DevTools 的可视化与运行时问题定位修复

team-interactive-craft.name: team-interactive-craft
team-interactive-craft.description: Interactive component crafting team — builds interactive UI components with critique loops
team-interactive-craft.description_zh: 交互组件打磨团队：构建交互式 UI 组件，配批评循环持续改进

team-issue.name: team-issue
team-issue.description: Issue resolution pipeline team — discovers, analyzes, fixes, and closes issues end-to-end
team-issue.description_zh: 问题闭环团队：发现 → 分析 → 修复 → 关闭的端到端 Issue 处理管线

team-motion-design.name: team-motion-design
team-motion-design.description: Animation & motion design team — designs and implements UI motion and transition patterns
team-motion-design.description_zh: 动效设计团队：设计并实现 UI 动画与过渡效果

team-perf-opt.name: team-perf-opt
team-perf-opt.description: Performance optimization team — profiles, diagnoses, and fixes performance bottlenecks
team-perf-opt.description_zh: 性能优化团队：profiling → 诊断瓶颈 → 修复，多角色协作提升性能

team-planex.name: team-planex
team-planex.description: Plan-and-execute pipeline team — requirement-to-delivery closed loop driven by acceptance criteria
team-planex.description_zh: 规划执行团队：需求 → 验收标准 → 规划 → 执行 → 验证的需求交付闭环

team-roadmap-dev.name: team-roadmap-dev
team-roadmap-dev.description: Roadmap-driven development team — phased milestone execution from a project roadmap
team-roadmap-dev.description_zh: 路线图驱动开发团队：按里程碑分阶段执行 roadmap

team-ui-polish.name: team-ui-polish
team-ui-polish.description: UI polish team — refines visual and interaction details for design quality
team-ui-polish.description_zh: UI 设计质量打磨团队：精修视觉与交互细节

team-uidesign.name: team-uidesign
team-uidesign.description: Design tokens & audit team — manages design tokens and runs UI design audits
team-uidesign.description_zh: 设计令牌与审计团队：管理 design tokens，执行 UI 设计审计

team-ultra-analyze.name: team-ultra-analyze
team-ultra-analyze.description: Deep collaborative analysis team — multi-perspective exhaustive codebase analysis
team-ultra-analyze.description_zh: 深度协作分析团队：多视角穷尽式代码库分析

team-ux-improve.name: team-ux-improve
team-ux-improve.description: UX interaction team — identifies and fixes user-experience interaction issues
team-ux-improve.description_zh: UX 交互改进团队：识别并修复用户体验交互问题

team-visual-a11y.name: team-visual-a11y
team-visual-a11y.description: Visual accessibility QA team — WCAG-compliant visual accessibility checks and fixes
team-visual-a11y.description_zh: 视觉无障碍 QA 团队：符合 WCAG 的视觉可访问性检查与修复

scholar-anti-ai-writing.name: scholar-anti-ai-writing
scholar-anti-ai-writing.description: Remove AI writing patterns — detects and rewrites AI-typical phrasing for natural prose
scholar-anti-ai-writing.description_zh: 检测并改写 AI 典型表达模式，使文本更自然

scholar-citation-verify.name: scholar-citation-verify
scholar-citation-verify.description: Citation verification — checks references against source claims and contexts
scholar-citation-verify.description_zh: 核验参考文献与原文主张的一致性

scholar-experiment.name: scholar-experiment
scholar-experiment.description: Experiment analysis — analyzes, interprets, and visualizes experimental results
scholar-experiment.description_zh: 分析、解读并可视化实验结果

scholar-ideation.name: scholar-ideation
scholar-ideation.description: Research ideation — identifies research gaps and plans promising directions
scholar-ideation.description_zh: 识别研究空白并规划研究方向

scholar-latex-organizer.name: scholar-latex-organizer
scholar-latex-organizer.description: LaTeX organizer — cleans and restructures LaTeX project files and templates
scholar-latex-organizer.description_zh: 清理并重构 LaTeX 项目文件与模板

scholar-publish.name: scholar-publish
scholar-publish.description: Post-acceptance preparation — camera-ready and submission material packaging
scholar-publish.description_zh: 录用后准备 camera-ready 与提交材料

scholar-rebuttal-pro.name: scholar-rebuttal-pro

scholar-rebuttal-pro.description_zh: 基于 CLI 辅助论证分析撰写审稿回复

scholar-review.name: scholar-review
scholar-review.description: Paper review — reviews manuscripts and generates structured rebuttal responses
scholar-review.description_zh: 评审手稿并生成结构化 rebuttal 回复

scholar-thesis-docx.name: scholar-thesis-docx
scholar-thesis-docx.description: Thesis Word formatting — formats thesis documents for Word submission
scholar-thesis-docx.description_zh: 学位论文 Word 格式排版

scholar-writing.name: scholar-writing
scholar-writing.description: End-to-end paper writing — repo to publication-ready LaTeX manuscript
scholar-writing.description_zh: 端到端论文写作：从代码仓库到可投稿的 LaTeX 手稿

skill-generator.name: skill-generator
skill-generator.description: Skill generator — creates new Claude Code skills with sequential or autonomous phase patterns
skill-generator.description_zh: 创建新的 Claude Code 技能，支持顺序与自治两种阶段模式

skill-simplify.name: skill-simplify
skill-simplify.description: Skill simplify — refactors and trims skills while preserving behavior via integrity checks
skill-simplify.description_zh: 在保持行为完整性的前提下精简重构技能

skill-tuning.name: skill-tuning
skill-tuning.description: Skill tuning — diagnoses and iteratively optimizes skill execution issues
skill-tuning.description_zh: 诊断并迭代优化技能执行问题
